name: Vegetables Mornay
recipeIngredient: 16 oz frozen chestnuts and red peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the vegetables as directed on the package, then drain and place in a large bowl.
2. Stir in the sliced mushrooms.
3. In a small saucepan over medium heat, melt the margarine. Add flour, salt, nutmeg, and pepper; cook until smooth and bubbly, stirring constantly.
4. Remove from heat and gradually stir in milk. Cook over medium heat until thickened, stirring constantly.
5. Remove from heat and stir in Parmesan cheese. Pour over the vegetables and stir to coat well.
6. Spoon into a serving dish and sprinkle with bread crumbs (if desired).
7. Serve 12 servings (1/2-cup portions).
